content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.13%, Bank Nifty -1.26%, VIX +7.8% to 18.80 — risk-off tape. However, defensive pockets (Pharma, IT, FMCG) and energy/upstream are showing relative strength on Brent at $120+. Existing book is +0.65% on the day with multiple winners qualifying for SL trails; priority is locking gains, not adding cluster risk into a high-VIX session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1018.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.0% unrealized. Current SL 1015 is already above entry (good). Trailing slightly to 1018 (~1.4% below CMP 1032.90) — preserves room for normal chop while locking ~3.5% gain. Q4 beat thesis intact, ICICI Sec TP 1350. Above-VWAP, holding 1030 support."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL already at entry+1.6% (1762 vs 1734 entry), gain locked. Q4 results May 21 is binary — within 3-week window but not within 3 trading sessions, so no event-rule trigger yet. Will re-evaluate as event approaches. No-op MODIFY avoided; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.0% unrealized at 52w high. Trailing SL from 478 → 476 — wait, that's looser, REJECT. Re-think: current SL 478 is already above entry 469 (+1.9%). New SL must be ≥478. Setting 478 = no-op. Use HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 218.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — current SL 195 already at entry-2.5%. Position still -1.9% off intraday high but +10.7% on day. Cannot tighten without going above CMP. Will use HOLD instead via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.8%, SL 119 still 3.1% below CMP 122.82. VIX +7.8% supports gold thesis; intraday recovery to 122.7 from 121.7 low. Hold; SL gives appropriate room for gold's lower volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.9%. Brent at $120+ is the thesis driver, intact. SL 295 (-1.5% from CMP 299.40) appropriately tight. Holding for Q4 print + crude tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.4%. Defensive ETF, sector outperforming today. SL 22.85 ~3.8% below CMP appropriate for ETF volatility. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1018.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1015 → 1018 (~1.4% below CMP 1032.90). Locks ~3.5% gain on a +5% winner; respects 0.5% trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1762 already above entry 1734 (+1.6%). +2.5% unrealized. To respect 0.5% trail-gap rule (SL ≤ 1769 vs CMP 1777.90), and to not no-op at 1762, holding as-is. Will revisit as May 21 Q4 print approaches (within 3 sessions = exit/trim per binary-event rule)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 478 already above entry 469. +3.0% gain locked. CMP 484, trail to e.g. 481 would respect 0.5% gap, but increment is small (3 bps) and below 0.5%-of-SL micro-adjust threshold (0.5% of 478 = 2.39, 481-478=3 — borderline). Holding to avoid noise; will trail aggressively if 491+ taken out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Held at 200 entry, CMP 197.81 (-1.1%). Day's gap-up of +10.7% from prior close 178.65 is the move; my entry was at the gap, so I'm slightly underwater on a position that's actually working. SL 195 (-2.5% from entry, -1.4% from CMP) is appropriate. No tightening possible without choking position. Hold for continuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "VIX surge supports gold thesis; SL 119 well-positioned. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Brent $120+ thesis intact; marginal P&L; SL appropriately tight. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, sector outperforming. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TECHM (+3.92%, IT outperforming, Q4 margin beat, FY27 15% EBIT target) is the most attractive new-entry candidate but I already have 7 CNC positions and two open BUY orders (BAJFINANCE, GESHIP) pending. Adding more on a -1.13% Nifty / VIX +7.8% day risks stacking exposure into a high-vol tape. SYNGENE +15.87% is a sell-the-news catch-falling-knife after Q4 PAT -36% YoY; pass. CHENNPETRO faded sharply from 1159 high to 1120 (-3.4% intraday) — failed breakout, pass. RELIANCE Q4 PAT -12.5% YoY, broker mixed, pass. ITC has Q4 results May 5 (within 3 sessions = binary-event rule blocks new entry). BAJFINANCE BUY @944 already pending; GESHIP BUY @1542 already pending — GESHIP now at 1573 (+2.0% above limit), the order may not fill but I will not chase higher. CANCEL consideration for GESHIP if it stays well above limit into close.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, well below 80% soft target. Two pending BUYs (BAJFINANCE, GESHIP) would add ~7% more if filled. 5-day rolling P&L is -₹3,991 with 13% win rate / 0.5x profit factor — a poor stretch. Today's intraday +0.65% is encouraging but I need to be disciplined: NOT add positions for activity's sake on a high-VIX risk-off day. The right move is letting today's winners run with locked gains (PNBHOUSING trailed, SUNPHARMA/COALINDIA SL already above entry) and re-evaluating tomorrow. Cash buffer 63% provides ample dry powder for genuine setups. Sector exposure check: Energy (ONGC) + Metals (COALINDIA) + Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK + pending BAJFINANCE) + Pharma (SUNPHARMA, PHARMABEES) — Financials cluster will hit ~20% if BAJFINANCE fills, cap watch. No new entries today."
}
